bugs.title: Generic team page only handled NHL routes
bugs.summary: MLB drill-downs like /team/OAK rendered 'Team not found' because the generic team page and API were NHL-only.
bugs.notes: Fixed by making generic team pages detect league and support MLB data paths.

bugs.title: Full admin QA backlog needs structured tracking
bugs.summary: Bugs and cron jobs were being tracked ad hoc in chat instead of in one IT review surface.
bugs.notes: Initial admin ops surface created, but should keep evolving with more operational controls.

cronSchedules.name: QA cycle
cronSchedules.purpose: Run structured QA checks across pages, picks, APIs, and odds coverage.
cronSchedules.notes: Keep this aligned with heartbeat + any Vercel cron coverage.

cronSchedules.name: PGA DataGolf scrape
cronSchedules.purpose: Refresh cached tournament data before picks generation.
cronSchedules.notes: Needs monitoring when source pages change.
